text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 17 

BENE_ID 

LABEL: CCW Encrypted Beneficiary ID Number 

DESCRIPTION: The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary. The CCW assigns a unique beneficiary identification 
number to each individual who receives Medicare and/or Medicaid and uses that number to identify 
an individual’s records in all CCW data files (e.g., Medicare claims, MAX claims, and MDS assessment 
data). 

This number does not
